category_sources: Official Taplo site describes it as a versatile, feature-rich TOML toolkit with validation, formatting, and language-server features; source_facts.description says TOML toolkit written in Rust.
display_name_sources: Official site heading and title use Taplo.
docs_sources: Official Taplo site is the documentation surface with Command Line, Library, and Configuration sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/tamasfe/taplo; repo not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Taplo site lists command-line usage, TOML validation, formatter options, schema support, and an embeddable language server.
